{{CargoRelic
|name=Rainbow Dump
|class_id=20147
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This substance with a dazzling rainbow luster contains the essence and strong life force of some unknown creature. According to the sample analysis, its rainbow luster comes from a trace substance that exists only in the cores of rare divine beasts, which is vital to their living!
|fame=13
|art=29
|fth=18
|civ=14
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 50 Mystery Gloops claimed, Snail DEF +1<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 2000/2000
|ss2=Per 50 Mystery Gloops claimed, Snail DEF +2<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 2000/2000
|ss3=Per 50 Mystery Gloops claimed, Snail DEF +3<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 2000/2000
|ss4=Per 50 Mystery Gloops claimed, Snail DEF +3<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 2000/2000
|ss7=Per 50 Mystery Gloops claimed, Snail DEF +3<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 2000/2000<br> (Awakened)
}}
